context: Agent was asked to create a plan for an E-commerce Checkout Redesign. This scenario specifically evaluates naming, slug format, and P{NN}T{NN} identifier compliance throughout all generated files.

checklist.name: plan-slug-is-kebab-case
checklist.description: The plan root directory slug is lowercase kebab-case (e.g. plan-ecommerce-checkout-redesign). Violation: PlanEcommerceCheckout, plan_ecommerce_checkout, plan-Ecommerce-Checkout, PLAN-CHECKOUT

checklist.name: phase-slugs-are-kebab-case
checklist.description: All phase directory slugs are lowercase kebab-case and describe the phase outcome (e.g. phase-01-cart-review-component, phase-03-payment-integration). No numeric-only slugs (e.g. phase-1/)

checklist.name: task-identifier-format-all-files
checklist.description: Every task file uses the P{NN}T{NN} format with zero-padded 1-based numbers for both phase and task. Examples: task-P01T01-*.md, task-P02T03-*.md. Violations: task-1-1.md, task-p1t1.md, task-01-03.md

checklist.name: task-numbering-starts-at-01
checklist.description: Task numbering within each phase starts at T01 (not T00). Phase numbering starts at P01 (not P00). Confirmed by inspecting all task filenames

checklist.name: task-numbering-sequential-no-gaps
checklist.description: Task numbers within each phase are sequential with no gaps (e.g. P01T01, P01T02, P01T03 — not P01T01, P01T03, P01T05)

checklist.name: phase-numbering-sequential-no-gaps
checklist.description: Phase numbers are sequential with no gaps across the plan (e.g. P01, P02, P03 — not P01, P03, P05)

checklist.name: no-spaces-or-underscores-in-slugs
checklist.description: No directory or file name contains spaces, underscores, or mixed case. All paths use hyphens as word separators

checklist.name: phase-and-task-zero-padding-two-digits
checklist.description: All phase and task numbers use two-digit zero-padding (01, 02, ... 10, 11 — not 1, 2, 10). This applies to both the directory prefix and the P{NN}T{NN} identifier in the filename

checklist.name: task-slug-after-identifier-is-descriptive
checklist.description: The slug portion of each task filename (after P{NN}T{NN}-) is descriptive and reflects the task content (e.g. task-P01T02-cart-item-quantity-component.md — not task-P01T02-task.md or task-P01T02-step.md)

checklist.name: root-readme-is-index
checklist.description: Root README.md links to phases but contains no task-level implementation detail

checklist.name: phase-readmes-include-goal-gate
checklist.description: Every phase README.md includes a goal statement and a concrete, runnable gate

checklist.name: validate-plan-run
checklist.description: Agent ran validate-plan.sh <plan-slug> after creating all files

checklist.name: completion-summary-includes-paths
checklist.description: Completion summary lists all file paths including directory-separated structure (not just a count)

checklist.name: slug-length-reasonable
checklist.description: Slugs are concise — no single slug segment exceeds 5 words (50 characters). Overly long slugs reduce readability
